figures.caption: Fig. 5: Qualitative reconstruction results on MultiCamRobolab datasets.

Fig. 2: Method Overview. Given multiple video inputs: Our method first uses a feed-forward model for initialization to achieve a global scale anchor and initialized poses (Step1). Then, we build a spatio-temporal connection graph during tracking to estimate camera poses and maintain a consistent scale (Step2). At last, we leverage the dense optical flow, estimated poses, and achieved connection graph to refine per-pixel depth to get a consistent scene and refined camera poses.
